meaning_en: The source payload was downloaded and saved under an ignored temporary path; checksum and size are logged.
meaning_zh: 来源内容已下载并保存到被忽略的临时路径；日志记录校验和与大小。
allowed_project_use: Use as checksum-backed access evidence and extract reviewed metadata only.
caution_en: Downloaded payload still needs rights and content review before raw material is committed.
caution_zh: 已下载内容在提交原始材料前仍需权利和内容复核。

meaning_en: The server returned an HTML access-restricted page; this proves endpoint reachability and access boundary only.
meaning_zh: 服务器返回访问限制 HTML 页面；只证明端点可达和访问边界。
allowed_project_use: Use as access-boundary evidence; use browser-verified or manual-exported metadata for source facts.
caution_en: Do not infer hidden database rows from an access-restricted page.
caution_zh: 不得从访问限制页推断隐藏数据库行。

meaning_en: The server returned a browser/client challenge page; this proves endpoint reachability and automation boundary only.
meaning_zh: 服务器返回浏览器或客户端挑战页面；只证明端点可达和自动化边界。
allowed_project_use: Use as access-boundary evidence; retry only with documented controlled browsing if needed.
caution_en: Do not bypass technical protections or treat the challenge page as source content.
caution_zh: 不得绕过技术保护，也不得把挑战页当作来源正文。

meaning_en: The downloader failed before receiving a usable payload; the error message may document TLS, DNS, timeout, or connection boundaries.
meaning_zh: 下载器在取得可用内容前失败；错误信息可记录 TLS、DNS、超时或连接边界。
allowed_project_use: Use as a logged access-risk note and keep separately reviewed source metadata if available.
caution_en: Do not treat download_error as proof that the page content was captured.
caution_zh: 不得把 download_error 当作页面内容已采集的证明。

meaning_en: The server returned an HTTP error code; status code and reason document access failure.
meaning_zh: 服务器返回 HTTP 错误码；状态码和原因记录访问失败。
allowed_project_use: Use as access-risk evidence and revisit only when the source remains important.
caution_en: Do not extract source claims from an HTTP error response unless the body is separately reviewed.
caution_zh: 除非单独复核响应正文，否则不得从 HTTP 错误响应提取来源断言。

meaning_en: The payload exceeded the manifest max_bytes limit and was not saved.
meaning_zh: 内容超过 manifest 的 max_bytes 限制，原始内容未保存。
allowed_project_use: Register as size-boundary evidence and create a large-source handling plan before retrying.
caution_en: Do not increase limits casually; split, sample, or register the large package first.
caution_zh: 不得随意提高限制；应先分包、抽样或登记大型来源包。
